name: trae-skills-marketplace
description: Local marketplace for Trae AI skills

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Navigate pages, fill forms, click buttons, take screenshots, extract data, test web apps, and automate any browser task.

plugins.name: guizang-ppt-skill
plugins.description: Generate horizontal swipe web PPT (single HTML file) with WebGL backgrounds, chapter covers, data billboards, image grids, and more. Two styles: magazine/e-ink (serif + fluid + warm) and Swiss Internationalism (sans-serif + grid + IKB/lemon/lime/orange highlights).

plugins.name: stock-analysis
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive stock analysis reports with data fetching, AI analysis, and HTML visualization. Supports A-share, US stocks, and global tickers.
